description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this wallet from wac by wrangler is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. wac have transformed this traditional accessory by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet.Dimensions: 11 cm x 9 cmHas two main compartments with textile liningOne credit card slot and one id card slot on the leftTwo slip pockets on either sideOne pocket on the right with a press buttoned closureStitch detailing and branding embossed on the frontCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
